message:
Use Zig main() with full native bindings instead of qjsc main()

Key changes:
- Remove native_bindings.c from wasm-static build (incomplete C bindings)
- Strip qjsc's main() from bundle_compiled.c (keep only bytecode array)
- Use Zig's main() in wasm_main_static.zig which has complete native bindings
- Zig code has: fs, fetch (via wasm_fetch.zig), spawn, crypto - all working

The build process now:
1. qjsc compiles JS to bytecode array
2. Strip qjsc's main() - keep only bundle[] and bundle_size
3. Add bridge functions (get_bundle_ptr, get_bundle_size)
4. Zig main() loads and executes bytecode with full native bindings

This enables network I/O via WasmEdge socket extensions.
